scripts.build:json: node tools/convert-bmf-to-json.mjs source/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.bmf fonts/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.json && node tools/convert-bmf-to-json.mjs source/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.bmf fonts/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.json
scripts.build:c: node tools/convert-bmf-to-c-header.mjs source/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.bmf include/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.h && node tools/convert-bmf-to-c-header.mjs source/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.bmf include/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.h
scripts.build:bin: node tools/convert-bmf-to-bin.mjs source/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.bmf binary/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.bin && node tools/convert-bmf-to-bin.mjs source/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.bmf binary/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.bin
scripts.build:bmp: node tools/convert-bmf-to-bmp.mjs source/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.bmf bitmap/font_terminal_ascii_5x7.bmp && node tools/convert-bmf-to-bmp.mjs source/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.bmf bitmap/font_terminal_latin1_8x12.bmp
